[cron:c3d7f1a2-8b5e-4f9a-a1c2-9d8e7f6b5a4c AWS Infrastructure Monitor] Run the AWS infrastructure monitor. Execute: node /Users/apple/.openclaw/workspace-incident-commander/scripts/monitor.js
Current time: Sunday, April 12th, 2026 — 7:03 PM (Asia/Calcutta) / 2026-04-12 13:33 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

The execution was denied due to an allowlist restriction. To run the AWS infrastructure monitor script, you'll need to approve this command. 

Please run the following command to approve and execute the monitor:

```
/approve
```

Once approved, the monitor will:
1. Poll AWS CloudWatch metrics for EC2, ECS, Lambda, RDS, and ALB in us-west-2
2. Compare metrics against P1/P2/P3 severity thresholds
3. Detect any anomalies
4. If anomalies are found, trigger the diagnosis pipeline
5. Return a summary of the monitoring results

The current time is Sunday, April 12th, 2026 — 7:03 PM (IST), which is outside quiet hours (23:00-07:00 IST), so any P3 alerts would be delivered normally.
